---
title: "Jeremy A. Dubrulle Curiculum Vitae"
format: html
editor: visual
---

![Having fun during the PhD](../../2797A77C-78D8-4657-86DF-1AA6B2ED0081_1_105_c.jpeg)

#### First & first co-author Publications

-   Effect of Land-Use on Hantavirus Infection Among Introduced and Endemic Small Mammals of Madagascar, *Ecology and Evolution, April 2025, <https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.70914>*
-   CRISPR2025 New Zealand: Innovation and Collaboration, *The Crispr Journal, May 2025, <https://doi.org/10.1089/crispr.2025.0026>*

#### Workshop & Conferences

##### **Conferences attended & presented:**

-   Queenstown Research Week:

    -   2023: listener only
    -   2024: poster on Honours' degree work, see article here: **\[insert article link\]**
    -   2025: talk?

-   Auckland Maurice Wilkins Centre Symposium (poster on PhD project)

-   CRISPR2025 (listener only, but co-wrote a conference report, available at: <http://dx.doi.org/10.1089/crispr.2025.0026>

-   Ecology and Evolution of Infectious Diseases Conference 2021 (online poster)

##### Workshops:

-   Quarto and Git reproducibility (2025, two days)
-   Introduction to R and Bash (2024, one week)

##### Self-taught:

-   R for data science 2

### Soft skills

### Volunteering (Includes Science communication actions)

##### **Science communication**

#### Education

#### Work experience

-   Demonstrator Micr221, Sem. 1, 2025

-   Demonstrator Micr223, Sem. 2, 2024

-   Demonstrator PSCI202, Sem. 2, 2024

-   Research assistant positions

    -   6 months (30hr/week) under Prof. Jemma Geoghegan, University of Otago.
    -   1.5 year (full-time) under Prof. Pablo Tortosa, University of La Reunion.

-   Bats trapping on Reunion Island (Several overnight trapping missions of endemic bats)

-   European Researchers' Night of Science <https://nuitdeschercheurs-france.eu/?2024>

-   2x Stall at The Science Festival on Reunion Island

##### **Talks**

-   Multiple departmental talk:
    -   2x colloquia
    -   1x departmental seminar
-   Thirst for Knowledge, May 2024 <https://www.facebook.com/thirstforknowledge.otago/>
-   3MT competition <https://www.otago.ac.nz/postgraduate-study/threeminutethesis>
* Radio One 91 FM Live Interview on Phage Therapy 

##### **Social engagements**

-   Part of the microbiology and immunology social committee (2025-?)
-   Organised & co-oragnised multiple independent events for the department and new students

##### Useful materials to know me better

**Github**: <https://github.com/jerem974>

**LinkedIN**:

**Google Scholar Profile**: <https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0s4R-XUAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao>
